history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02, column B facing right `>`. The next cell in front of me (row 02, column C) contains lava `L`, so moving forward is not safe. I need to avoid lava. I can try turning downwards to navigate around the lava. Turning right from facing right will make me face down `v`, which is safe as the cell below (row 03, column B) is floor `.`.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
Now I am facing down `v` at row 02, column B. The cell in front of me (row 03, column B) is a floor cell `.` which is safe. I will move forward to get closer to the goal which is at row 08, column H.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 03, column B facing down `v`. The next cell in front of me (row 04, column B) is a floor `.` and safe to move into. Moving forward continues my path around the lava to reach the goal at row 08, column H.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am currently at row 04, column B, facing down `v`. The next cell in front (row 05, column B) is a floor `.` and safe to move into. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal path.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 05, column B facing down `v`. The next cell in front (row 06, column B) is a floor `.` and safe to move onto. I will continue moving forward towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am currently at row 06, column B facing down `v`. The cell in front (row 07, column B) is lava `L` which is deadly, so moving forward is not safe. I need to change my direction. The goal is at column H, so I should turn right to face right `>` and then move forward along the safe path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06, column B facing left `<`. The goal is towards the right side at column H. Since moving left takes me away from the goal and there's a wall on my left, I should turn around. I will turn left twice to face right `>`.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06, column B facing down `v`. The goal is to the right at column H. Moving forward leads to lava at row 07, column B, which is deadly. I should turn right to face left `<` again or better to turn right twice to face up `^` and try to navigate around lava. Since I first need to face right, I will turn right once.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06, column B facing left `<`. Moving forward to the left is a wall, which is not possible. I need to face right (towards the goal on the right side). To turn from left to right, I will turn right twice (or turn left twice), so I will start by turning right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing up `^` at row 06, column B. Moving forward would lead to row 05, column B which is a lava cell, so going forward is dangerous. To reach the goal on the right (near column H), I should turn right now to face right `>` and then move forward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing right `>` at row 06, column B. The cell in front of me, row 06, column C, is floor `.` which is safe. I will move forward to continue progressing towards the goal near column H, row 08.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right `>` at row 06, column C. The next cell forward, row 06, column D, is floor `.` which is safe. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal near column H.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06, column D, facing right `>`. The next cell forward, row 06, column E, is floor `.` and safe to move into. Moving forward will continue my path towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06, column E, facing right `>`. The next cell forward, row 06, column F, is floor `.` so it is safe to move forward. Moving forward will continue to approach the goal cell in column H row 08.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06, column F, facing right `>`. The next cell forward, row 06, column G, is floor `.` and safe to move forward. Continuing forward brings me closer to the goal at row 08, column H.

<action>

<thought>

</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06, column H, facing right `>`. The next cell forward, row 06, column I, is a wall `#` and I cannot move forward. I need to change direction. The goal is at row 08, column H, which is below me. To face downwards `v` from the current orientation `>`, I need to turn right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06, column H, facing down `v`. The next cell forward, row 07, column H, is lava `L` and moving forward would be deadly. I need to avoid the lava. Since the goal is at row 08, column H, and moving forward is unsafe, I should find another direction. Turning left will face me right `>` towards a wall. Turning right will face me left `<` towards an empty floor. It is safer to turn right and then move forward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<action>

<thought>
I am at row 06, column E, facing left `<`. The next cell forward, row 06, column D, is an empty floor `.` and safe to move forward. Moving forward will bring me closer to the left edge and eventually I need to navigate upwards towards the goal at row 08, column H. I will move forward now.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06, column D, facing left `<`. The next cell forward, row 06, column C, has lava `L` and is deadly. So I cannot move forward. I should turn to find a safer path to the goal at row 08, column H. Since the goal is generally to the right and down, I will turn right to face upward `^`.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
